name: Electrocompetent E. coli Preparation
nameCn: 电转感受态大肠杆菌的制备

components.name: 1. Inoculate 5 mL LB from glycerol stock; 37°C 250 rpm overnight

note.en: Use DH10B, DH5α, or XL1-Blue for cloning; BL21 for expression. Pre-chill centrifuge to 4°C the night before.
note.zh: 克隆用 DH10B、DH5α 或 XL1-Blue；表达用 BL21。提前将离心机预冷至 4°C。

components.name: 2. Dilute 1:100 into 500 mL fresh LB; shake 37°C 250 rpm to OD₆₀₀ = 0.4–0.6

note.en: This takes 2–3 h. Monitor every 30 min after OD = 0.3. Do not exceed OD 0.6 — competence declines.
note.zh: 通常需要 2–3 h。OD 到 0.3 后每 30 min 监测一次。不超过 OD 0.6 — 感受态下降。

components.name: 3. Chill culture on ice 15–30 min; pre-chill all equipment (tubes, buffers, rotors)

note.en: Every step from here is at 4°C or on ice. Electrocompetent cells are highly temperature-sensitive.
note.zh: 从此步起所有操作在 4°C 或冰上进行。电转感受态细胞对温度极敏感。

note.en: Use pre-chilled bottles. Decant carefully — pellet is loose. Remove as much supernatant as possible (residual salt impairs electroporation).
note.zh: 使用预冷离心瓶。小心倾倒——沉淀松散。尽量去除上清（残留盐分影响电穿孔）。

note.en: Wash 1: resuspend in 500 mL 10% glycerol; spin 4,000×g 15 min 4°C. Wash 2: 250 mL. Wash 3: 50 mL. Then resuspend in 2 mL 10% glycerol. Conductivity must be <100 µS/cm (critical for electroporation efficiency).
note.zh: 洗涤 1：500 mL 10% 甘油重悬；4,000×g 15 min 4°C。洗涤 2：250 mL。洗涤 3：50 mL。最后 2 mL 10% 甘油重悬。电导率需 <100 µS/cm（电穿孔效率关键）。

components.name: 6. Aliquot 50 µL per tube; snap-freeze in liquid N₂; store −80°C

note.en: Single-use aliquots (do not refreeze). Efficiency should be ≥10⁹ CFU/µg pUC19 (verify with test transformation).
note.zh: 50 µL 单次用量分装（勿重复冻融）。效率应 ≥10⁹ CFU/µg pUC19（测试转化验证）。

note.en: Electroporate 1 µL pUC19 (10 pg/µL) with 25 µL cells. Time constant: ≥5 ms (1 mm cuvette). Expect ≥10⁸–10⁹ colonies/µg pUC19 for good batch.
note.zh: 用 1 µL pUC19（10 pg/µL）+ 25 µL 细胞测试电穿孔（1 mm 比色杯，时间常数 ≥5 ms）。优质批次应有 ≥10⁸–10⁹ 菌落/µg pUC19。

notes.en: Electrocompetent cells are 10–100× more efficient than chemical competent (CaCl₂) cells. Useful for: large libraries, low-concentration ligation products, fosmid/BAC transformation. Key: eliminate all salt from cells (LB → salt → arc during electroporation = cell death).
notes.zh: 电转感受态效率比化学法（CaCl₂）高 10–100 倍。适用于：大型文库、低浓度连接产物、fosmid/BAC 转化。关键：彻底去除细胞中所有盐分（LB→盐分→电穿孔时放弧 = 细胞死亡）。

ref: Dower et al. (1988) Nucleic Acids Res 16:6127–6145; Green & Sambrook (2012) Molecular Cloning 4th ed.; Sheng et al. (1995) BioTechniques 18:104

usage.en: Prepare electrocompetent E. coli cells for high-efficiency electroporation.
usage.zh: 制备电转化感受态大肠杆菌，用于高效电转化。
